3244990.name: Unreality: Beyond Worlds
3244990.description:
Unreality: Beyond Worlds is a co-op sci-fi horror extraction game where you and your squad deploy into fractured dimensions called Branches.

Every incursion begins with a clear directive: destroy the Branch. Neutralizing these unstable worlds halts their spread, rewarding you with XP and a small payout. This mission never changes it’s the anchor of every deployment.

But survival isn’t simple. Inside each Branch, you’ll find liminal environments, hostile anomalies, and valuable artifacts. Looting is optional, but extracting with your haul is the main way to earn credits. Sell valuables, upgrade your facility, and gear up for harsher incursions.

Alongside your primary mission, vendors assign special tasks eliminate a certain threat, recover a rare item, or complete an objective under specific conditions. Completing these tasks earns you extra money, XP, and access to unique equipment.
3244990.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
